en: What's the strangest thing a fan has ever asked you to do?
ko: 팬이 부탁한 것 중 가장 이상한 건 뭐야?

en: A man in the KKK came up to me and said,
you know, Charlie, I usually hate niggas,
but ever since that Dave Chappelle show came on,
ko: "근데 그 데이브 샤펠 쇼가 시작된 이후로,"

en: you and Dave Chappelle make me and Bubba
And I'm never going to forget it.
And he said, you and Chappelle make me and Bubba
ko: 그리고 그가 말했어, "너랑 샤펠이 나랑 버바한테"

en: This happened, man. I'm not making it up.
ko: 진짜 있었던 일이야. 지어낸 거 아니야.
